summary: The diff includes a migration.mo file and modifications to backend/main.mo and project_state.json. The migration.mo addresses upgrade persistence (REQ-1 AC), and backend/main.mo shows relevant types and structure. However, the main.mo is truncated so we cannot verify full implementation of all backend functions. No frontend files were modified, meaning REQ-2 (frontend AddHospitalSamplePage using getAssignedHospitals), REQ-3 (HospitalManagementPage UI), and REQ-4 (HospitalDetailsPage UI) frontend acceptance criteria are unimplemented. The project_state.json shows all items as 'pending', further confirming no work was completed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Complete the phlebotomist-to-hospital assignment backend logic: assignPhlebotomistToHospital and removePhlebotomistFromHospital correctly update the map, validate phlebotomist existence and role.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo is truncated and the actual function bodies for assignPhlebotomistToHospital, removePhlebotomistFromHospital, and role validation cannot be confirmed as implemented. The project_state.json marks REQ-1 as 'pending'.

missing_requirements.requirement: Complete area-matching logic and expose getAssignedHospitals query; AddHospitalSamplePage and HomeCollectionQueuePage use this query instead of fetching all hospitals.
missing_requirements.reason: No frontend files were modified. The AddHospitalSamplePage and HomeCollectionQueuePage are not updated to use getAssignedHospitals. The backend implementation of area-matching and getAssignedHospitals cannot be confirmed due to truncation. Project state marks REQ-2 as 'pending'.

missing_requirements.requirement: HospitalManagementPage must correctly reflect add, edit, and disable operations with optimistic UI updates and error toasts.
missing_requirements.reason: No frontend files were modified in the diff. HospitalManagementPage, AddHospitalModal, EditHospitalModal, and related frontend logic are not updated. Project state marks REQ-3 as 'pending'.

missing_requirements.requirement: HospitalDetailsPage phlebotomist assignment UI wired to backend with confirmation dialogs and success/error toasts.
missing_requirements.reason: No frontend files were modified in the diff. HospitalDetailsPage is not updated. Project state marks REQ-4 as 'pending'.
